title: Earnings Preview: First Solar (FSLR) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: First Solar (FSLR) was expected to deliver a year-over-year decline in earnings on lower revenues for Q1 2022. The company was expected to post a quarterly loss of $0.36 per share, representing a year-over-year change of -118.4%. For FY2022, FSLR was expected to report revenues of $2.61B, EBIT of $0.02, and FCF generation of -$0.61B, representing notable YoY decline of -10.7%, -95.23%, and -201.49% respectively. However, declines were attributed to increased start-up expenses by 404.76% YoY and capital expenditure by 203.7% YoY. Despite near-term earnings challenges, FSLR reported an ever-growing backlog in future deliveries of 44.3 GWs and new bookings of 27.1 GW YTD by FQ2'22. The company was in a heavy investment phase building manufacturing capacity and developing next-generation technologies.
